overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style game, ascending neon-lit stairs through a foggy futuristic urban environment, crossing a plaza with a holographic dragon, and traversing a neon tunnel to reach an indoor food court.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit concrete stairwell with red underlighting

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs illuminated by red neon strips, following an NPC ahead

notable_agents.action: character in white pants ascending stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: concrete stairs with glowing red neon strips on each step
rough gray concrete walls flanking the staircase
large illuminated advertisement displaying black boots with pink MILF text
dark metal handrails along the staircase edges

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a narrow concrete stairwell illuminated by vibrant red neon strips. An NPC in white pants walks ahead, leading toward a large billboard advertising boots at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor with graffiti mural leading to plaza exit

events.description: exits stairwell into upper covered corridor with motorcycle mural
exits covered corridor into open foggy plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper corridor and approaching the exit to the open plaza

entered.detail: large wall painting of a motorcycle with green neon outline
white concrete stairs branching off to the right
opening leading to the foggy outdoor plaza

segments.scene_description: Moving through an upper corridor, the camera passes a prominent motorcycle mural on the right wall. The environment transitions from the enclosed stairwell to a covered walkway before opening into the foggy plaza ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban plaza with holographic monument

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza toward the tunnel entrance, passing the holographic dragon

notable_agents.action: distant figures walking near the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: tall cylindrical display projecting a white animated dragon coiling around the structure
large circular neon sign with red and blue Brain Wash text
dark entranceway framed by vertical blue neon lights

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a wide foggy plaza dominated by a glowing holographic dragon pillar. The Brain Wash neon sign glows on the right as the camera approaches a tunnel entrance framed by blue neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit tunnel with moving walkways and linear lighting

events.description: enters the blue neon-lit tunnel with moving walkways

agents.ego_description: standing on the moving walkway traveling through the long neon tunnel

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking on the adjacent parallel walkway

entered.detail: long corridor with continuous blue neon tube lights running along walls and ceiling
automated conveyor belt floor transporting passengers forward
large projected advertisements on the tunnel walls including a giant human figure

segments.scene_description: Entering a long tunnel illuminated by cool blue neon lights, the camera rides a moving walkway. Holographic advertisements project onto the walls, including a massive human silhouette, while the tunnel stretches ahead toward a distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor food court with service counter

events.description: exits tunnel into indoor food court area with service counter

agents.ego_description: approaching the service counter in the food court, observing the vendor and seated customers

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the service counter

entered.detail: long dark service counter with green stools and menu displays
illuminated menu screens showing food items and prices
tables and chairs with customers seated eating

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the camera enters an indoor food court featuring a central service counter with a vendor, neon menu boards, and scattered customers seated at tables. The environment shifts from the cool blue tunnel to warmer artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, neon-lit stairwell into a sprawling, futuristic indoor food court. It begins by ascending concrete stairs illuminated by red neon strips, following an NPC toward a large boot advertisement at the top. As the camera moves through an upper corridor past a motorcycle mural, the enclosed space opens into a wide, foggy plaza dominated by a glowing holographic dragon and a Brain Wash neon sign. The scene then shifts into a long tunnel of cool blue light, where the camera glides along a moving walkway past massive holographic silhouettes. Finally, the camera exits the tunnel and enters a food court, as the cool blue tones transition into warmer artificial lighting surrounding a central service counter and seated customers.
